summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cash Piloting Dashboard. All major features working correctly including KPI cards, scenario toggle, projection chart, monthly table, quick add form, pressure panel, and all CRUD dialogs. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% test pass rate.

design_issues.issue: Missing accessibility descriptions for DialogContent components

passed_tests: All 41 backend API tests (100% success rate)
KPI Cards display (Cash Now, Lowest Point, Pressure Month, Status)
Scenario Toggle functionality (Committed, Likely, Extended, Full)
Monthly Breakdown Table with all columns
Quick Add Form - cash flow creation
Cash Flows Dialog - view and manage flows
Pressure Panel - month selection and analysis
Chart and table month selection integration
